column1: You can copy down my answers, _________ I'm not sure they're right.
___________ you haven't been kind to my uncle, I will be pleased to help you one more time.
He reaches his destination ___________ many unfortunate contrarieties.
___________ the pain in his leg, he completed the marathon.
____________having all the necessary qualifications, they didn’t offer me the job.
I can't leave her __________ I know she's all right
I shall not go ___________the weather is fine.
